item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers the brake, explicitly rejects translating each new error into another upstream person, recognizes the repeated local-patch pattern, and moves the remedy toward structural causes: unique numbering source, automatic generation, entrance validation, responsibility point, and cancellation of the temporary checker. It does allow a one-day emergency verification person, but frames it as temporary stopgap only, not a new default gate or standing role."}
